attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, 
  GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
  GL.PRODUCT_KEY,
  GL.AR_TRX_KEY, 
  GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
  GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
  GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
  GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  GL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, 
  GL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  GL.SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
  GL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
  GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
  GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
  GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  GL.DD_GL_DATETIME, 
  GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
  GL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, 
  GL.DV_FISCAL_DT,
  GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD, 
  GL.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
  GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD, 
  GL.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  GL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD, 
  GL.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
  GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, 
  GL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
  GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG, 
  GL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
  GL.DV_CHARGES_FLG, 
  GL.DV_MISC_FLG,
  GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG, 
  GL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
  GL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, 
  GL.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
  GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
  GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
  GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM, 
  GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
  GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT, 
  GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
  GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT, 
  GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
  GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT, 
  GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
  GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY, 
  GL.EDW_CREATE_USER,
  GL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
  GL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  GL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
  GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD, 
  GL.GL_DT,
  GL.BK_SS_CD, 
  GL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
  GL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
  GL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
  GL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD, 
  GL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, 
  GL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
  GL.TRANSACTION_DT, 
  GL.GL_POSTED_DTM,
  WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT,
  GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY ,
  GL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
  GL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
  GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,   
  GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,   
  GL.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID   ,
  GL.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, /*PRBOBBA: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
  GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
  GL.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
  , GL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,                  /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
  GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  ,     /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */ 
  GL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME ,   /* pneelraj : Added as part of Q1FY16 ICPM */
  GL.XCAT_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 GL.ELA_FLG,/* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
 GL.POB_TYPE_CD,/*added as part of NRS PI2 */
 GL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,/*agannava : NRS MPOB Change*/
 GL.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG, /*agannava : NRS MPOB Change*/
 GL.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD, /*  Added as part of RO  Sep 10th Changes*/
 GL.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD , /* added as part of Revenue accruals Q2FY19  */
 GL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY, /* added as part of Revenue accruals Q2FY19  */
 GL.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY, /* added as part of Revenue MERAKI Q2FY19  */
 GL.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY,/*ADDED AS PART OF REVENUE RESIDUALS*/
 GL.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE,/*ADDED AS PART OF annuity q3fy20*/
 GL.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE /*ADDED AS PART OF annuity q3fy20*/
 ,GL.NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,GL.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,GL.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,GL.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 ,GL.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY22: April Release*/

FROM 
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE GL,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
  WHERE GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN WTADC.TAXAUDIT_MONTH_START_INT AND WTADC.TAXAUDIT_MONTH_END_INT
